Global (All).title: Hong Kong’s Economic and Political Crisis Escalates
Global (All).summary: Hong Kong's economy suffers as protests continue.

Global (All).title: Riots in Cuba
Global (All).summary: Anti-government protests in Cuba turn violent.

Global (All).title: North Korea and US Diplomatic Tensions

United States.title: Texas school shooting: 3rd suspect arrested in aftermath of shooting at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde
United States.summary: A third suspect has been arrested in connection with the Texas school shooting that killed 19 children and two teachers last week.

United States.title: U.S. Supreme Court blocks Maine's vaccine mandate for healthcare workers
United States.summary: The High Court ruled that the mandate violated the Religious Freedom Restoration Act (RFRA) and the First Amendment.

United States.title: U.S. economy grows at 2.6% annual rate in Q1, below expectations
United States.summary: The Commerce Department reported that the U.S. economy expanded at a 2.6% annual rate in the first quarter, missing analyst forecasts.

South Korea.title: Suspected North Korean Spy Detained in South Korea
South Korea.summary: South Korean authorities have detained a North Korean national suspected of espionage. The individual, a man in his 40s, was caught attempting to sneak into South Korea from China. His mission and goals are still unclear but authorities are investigating further.

South Korea.title: South Korean Protesters Clash with Police over Economic Concerns
South Korea.summary: Protests erupted in major cities across South Korea, with demonstrators demanding action on economic instability. The protesters, primarily concerned with rising inflation and unemployment, clashed with police in several instances.

South Korea.title: South Korea Raises Alert Levels for Possible COVID-19 Re-emergence
South Korea.summary: As COVID-19 cases rise globally, South Korea has increased its alert levels, advising citizens to remain vigilant and take precautions. The government has also reintroduced some travel restrictions and mask mandates to prevent any potential outbreaks.

Japan.title: Japan PM Kishida’s approval rating sinks to record low: Asahi poll
Japan.summary: Japan’s Prime Minister Fumio Kishida saw his approval ratings plummet to a record low, at 31%, according to an Asahi poll, dealing a blow to his government ahead of upper house elections.

Japan.title: Japan warns against traveling to US over COVID-19
Japan.summary: The Japanese government has raised its travel warning level for the US due to the spread of COVID-19, advising citizens to exercise caution when traveling there.

Japan.title: Japan's 2023 defence budget to exceed 1% of GDP: reports
Japan.summary: Japan's 2023 defence budget is set to exceed 1% of its GDP for the first time, according to reports, as the country continues to bolster its military in response to regional security challenges.
